source_description: In an apartment living room, Rachel, Ross, Monica, and Phoebe sit around a coffee table holding a pizza box. Joey stands nearby holding a deck of cards.
Joey extends the deck of cards toward Monica. "Okay, pick a card. Any card," he says. Monica pulls a card from the deck.
Joey extends the deck of cards toward Monica. "Okay, pick a card. Any card," he says. Monica pulls a card from the deck.
Joey says, "All right, now memorize it." Monica looks down at the card in her hand.
Joey stands with his hands resting together in front of his waist.
Monica turns the card around to display it to Rachel, Ross, and Phoebe, who all look at it.
Monica turns the card around to display it to Rachel, Ross, and Phoebe, who all look at it.
"Got it. All right, give it back to me," Joey says, extending his hand. Monica hands the card back to him.
Joey takes the card, glances at it rapidly as he pulls it toward his body, and places it on top of the deck.
